---
title: "Saïten-Formel"
---

```{=html}
<div class="zoom-controls">
  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="0.9"
    onclick="setZoom(0.9)"
  >A−</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1"
    onclick="setZoom(1)"
  >A</button>

  <button
    type="button"
    data-scale="1.2"
    onclick="setZoom(1.2)"
  >A+</button>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  const baseFontSize = 16;
  const baseGlyphHeight = 30;
  const baseGlyphRowGap = 7.2;

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--base-scale",
    String(scale)
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--site-font-size",
    `${baseFontSize * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-height",
    `${baseGlyphHeight * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    "--glyph-row-gap",
    `${baseGlyphRowGap * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem(
    "site-zoom",
    String(scale)
  );

  document
    .querySelectorAll(".zoom-controls button")
    .forEach(button => {
      button.classList.toggle(
        "active",
        Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
      );
    });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem("site-zoom") || 1
  );

  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```





## Kommentar

- erstmals in der 18. Dynastie belegt

## Schreibvarianten

::: {.glyphvariants-block}


:::



## Literatur

- Jansen-Winkeln, Karl 2000. Zum Verständnis der "Saitischen Formel". Studien zur Altägyptischen Kultur 28, 83-124.

- Meulenaere, H. J. A. de 1997–2000. Sculptures mendésiennes de Basse Époque. Jaarbericht van het Vooraziatisch-Egyptisch Genootschap Ex Oriente Lux 35–36, 33–39: F. 81

- NR: Klotz, David 2016. Get thee behind me, City God! New Kingdom versions of the so-called "Saite Formula". Zeitschrift für ägyptische Sprache und Altertumskunde 143 (2), 204-213. DOI: 10.1515/zaes-2016-0014.



```{=html}
<div class="footer-nav" id="footer-nav">
  <div class="nav-buttons">
    <a href="/index.html" class="btn-home">Home</a>
    <button onclick="
      if (document.referrer && document.referrer !== window.location.href) {
        history.back();
      } else {
        window.location.href = '/index.html';
      }
    " class="btn-back">← Zurück</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
function setZoom(scale) {
  scale = Number(scale) || 1;

  const root = document.documentElement;

  root.style.setProperty('--base-scale', String(scale));

  /*
   * Explicitly resize glyphs and row spacing.
   * Base glyph height: 30px
   * Base row gap: 7.2px
   */
  root.style.setProperty(
    '--glyph-height',
    `${30 * scale}px`
  );

  root.style.setProperty(
    '--glyph-row-gap',
    `${7.2 * scale}px`
  );

  localStorage.setItem('site-zoom', String(scale));

  document.querySelectorAll('.zoom-controls button').forEach(button => {
    button.classList.toggle(
      'active',
      Number(button.dataset.scale) === scale
    );
  });
}

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const saved = Number(
    localStorage.getItem('site-zoom') || 1
  );

  /*
   * Call the complete function here.
   * Do not restore only --base-scale, because the glyph-specific
   * variables must also be restored.
   */
  setZoom(saved);

  const cls = document.querySelector(
    'meta[name="slot-title-class"]'
  )?.content;

  const title = document.querySelector("h1.title");

  if (cls && title) {
    title.classList.add(cls);
  }
});
</script>
```
